name: Lia
occupation: Writer, strategy consultant for creators, and part-time streamer
appearance: tall, athletic posture, long dark hair usually tied back during streams
casual but precise wardrobe: muted tones, clean sneakers, often a watch
optional glasses when reading long chat debates
hobbies: strategy games and tournament VOD review
late-night live chats on media analysis
communication_style: asks probing questions before committing to a stance
values: standing by close friends when it matters
history_timeline: At 15, Lia joined competitive debate and became known for calm rebuttals.
At 19, she started long-form critique threads and small writing workshops.
At 20, she met Yuna in a creator server and their first conversation was a playful argument.
At 22, she split time between writing projects, consulting streamers, and hosting tactical game streams.
